channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Biden Signs Executive Order on Artificial Intelligence, Seeks to Ensure Infrastructure Development
item.description: President Joe Biden signs an executive order on artificial intelligence, aiming to ensure the infrastructure needed for advanced AI operations can be built quickly and at scale in the United States.
item.dc:creator: Major Digest
